name: Susie Lee
subject: the most competitive district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25532658/274157212/-1839819742?refcode=bsp_em_fr_x_logo_ux_xx&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZjY2JjMi00ZDc4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmQyyrFuWaldUsUuKZQR7snu471FFKUerU1DIk09m_Y=)

| | Team, This email is a bit longer than normal, but it would mean a lot to my team -- and me -- if you took just a few minutes to read. Nevadans in the 3rd District inspire my work __every single day.__ From Henderson and Searchlight to Sandy Valley and everything town in-between, I work to make Nevada a more equitable place for all who live there. However, Nevada’s 3rd District is considered the state’s most competitive. Yes, you read that right. In 2020, I won my seat by **__only 3 points.__** And 2022 is gearing up to be another tight race. I have a plan to keep this seat safely Democrat, and keep the House, but this is where I need your help. **[Can you donate $5, $10, or even $15 to my campaign so we have a war chest to back our efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25532659/274157213/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210226_FR_HTH1_A0_NA_U1_X2_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZjY2JjMi00ZDc4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmQyyrFuWaldUsUuKZQR7snu471FFKUerU1DIk09m_Y=)** | | | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25532660/274157214/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210226_FR_HTH1_A0_NA_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZjY2JjMi00ZDc4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmQyyrFuWaldUsUuKZQR7snu471FFKUerU1DIk09m_Y=)
---
Here’s how I plan to win -- and usher in more Democratic victories in Nevada -- in 2022:
1. **Organize early in the district.** From virtual town halls and events to conference calls, my team and I will be there. I want to hear from you, and everyone living in Nevada’s 3rd District, about what matters to _you._ Our district is large, and no two Nevadans have the same priorities. I get that. And that’s why I want to hear from as many of you as possible to hear how I can help.

2. **Put Nevadans first.** _You’re_ the ones funding my campaign, and the ones that I represent in Washington. Running for Congress, I put the people I represent first. Running in the state’s most competitive district has made me a prime target for national Republicans, but that doesn’t change my goal of keeping this district -- and the state -- solidly blue.

3. **Focus on the real issues facing Nevada.** Nevada is an incredibly unique place to live, which is why I love it. And that’s why I put my focus on issues that matter most to Nevadans across the state. I’m making public education stronger and more equitable and fighting to make climate change a priority.

4. **Hold the House.** It’s critical to keep the House of Representatives blue. Without a Democrat-held House, none of the important issues and policies that will help Nevadans will be a priority, let alone be passed. I know that sounds extreme, but Republicans aren’t willing to compromise and work together, which makes it all that much more important Democrats win. Without Democrats holding the House, nothing will get done. If we lose my seat, it could cost us the Democratic majority, putting an end to Joe Biden’s progressive agenda.

Look, I know my plan is ambitious. All of it, especially keeping the House blue, can be accomplished, but only with your help. **[Join me in keeping Nevada’s 3rd District blue. If you can, spare $15, $10, or even $5 to increase my war chest to continue to represent you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25532661/274157215/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210226_FR_HTH1_A0_NA_U1_X2_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZjY2JjMi00ZDc4LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XmQyyrFuWaldUsUuKZQR7snu471FFKUerU1DIk09m_Y=)**

| Hoosier Republican,

The Democrats have only been in charge in Washington for a few short weeks, and they’re already making it a top priority to tear down all of President Trump’s massive gains for the country.

**President Biden is bowling over all of the progress we made in the last four years with a historic number of executive orders**.

Without a majority in the House or the Senate, it is much, much harder to put the brakes on the radical left’s plans to open our borders, end our energy independence, defund the police, raise taxes on small businesses and the middle class, and more.

We are a nation of laws, and the Constitution gives the power to draft laws to Congress, not to the President.

**That’s why we need your help to support Indiana’s Republican delegation, and FLIP seats currently controlled by Democrats. Indiana did our part in the 2020 elections, but there is even more at stake in 2022**.

We just went through our records, and it looks like you haven’t gotten a chance to chip in yet this month, Hoosier Republican. Will you please do it now and help us defend our Republican stronghold and take back America?

I am reaching out today to ask for your help

Friend, it's Liz Cheney.
**I am reaching out today to ask for your help.****** Right now, Democrats in Congress are actively working to silence conservative voices. At a time when we should be following our constitutional principles to expand freedom and opportunity, Democrats are playing political games.__

Their cynical approach is devastating for our nation.

I am asking everyone receiving this email to chip in just $10 today to help us meet our end of month goal and get one step closer to taking back the House in 2022.

body:
This week’s biggest news has been Governor Holcomb’s expansion of vaccine availability to all Hoosiers 60 and over.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470258?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**60 and Over**_ This week’s biggest news was Governor Holcomb’s expansion of vaccine availability to all Hoosiers 60 and over. This is another landmark in our fight against the pandemic and is possible because of the leadership of Governor Holcomb and his team in getting vaccines out to our most vulnerable Hoosiers. After just one day of 60-64 eligibility, over 91,000 Indiana residents scheduled appointments for the first dose. That’s nearly a third of all eligible Hoosiers in that group! Indiana continues to lead the way nationally on vaccine distribution and this new round of eligibility will keep us at the top of those rankings.

This week we also hit halftime of the Indiana General Assembly’s 2021 legislative session and, while there isn’t a [halftime show](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f012486c33&e=1acd9bb3d6), a lot of progress is being made by our super majorities in both houses.

For as good as we see things here in Indiana, the bumbling Biden administration continues to stumble out of the gate in Washington DC. His far-left cabinet nominees are—thankfully—facing difficult confirmation paths. Additionally, it’s been made clear that President Biden wants to keep schools closed and keep our borders open. That’s not good policy and reinforces how crucial it will be for a unified Republican Party to push back against this agenda for two years and win back the House and Senate in 2022. We continue to do our part in Indiana, but we can’t rest on our laurels.

Thank you,
Kyle
_**Photo** : Congressman Greg Pence and Chairman Hupfer visited earlier this week at state party headquarters. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Expanding Vaccine Eligibility**_ Of course, the big news this week was the expansion of [vaccine eligibility to all Hoosiers aged 60 and over](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61d6640d06&e=1acd9bb3d6). **Governor Holcomb’s** data-driven approach to vaccination continues to earn praise. See more in the news section below.
[\--> Click here for more information and to register for a vaccine <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2471ae40e6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Governor Holcomb** was also named the 2021 Champion of Public Broadcasting by America’s Public Television Stations. APTS cited the governor’s expansion of broadband services and datacasting during the pandemic as part of the reason he was selection. You can read APTS’ press release by [clicking here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=33e12811b8&e=1acd9bb3d6) and watch the governor’s [acceptance video here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8479f7f1da&e=1acd9bb3d6).
To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4484337d18&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d49bc3f978&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=73b588fc3a&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Vaccination Efforts Earn Praise**_ "The vaccination process in Indiana has included clear eligibility guidelines. Hoosiers have benefited from a central registration website... even with the weather complications last week, Hoosiers are finding vaccine sites running like clockwork."

“Credit must also go to (ISDH Chief Medical Officer Dr. Lindsay) Weaver, Dr. Kristina Box, and Governor Eric Holcomb. They have been steadfast in sticking with the age-based vaccination plan, with the clear intent of driving down hospitalizations and deaths.”

Read the full editorial from the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9301097d18&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Interview**_ Last week, Chairman Hupfer had the chance to sit down with Ken de la Bastide of the Anderson Herald-Bulletin and Lebanon Reporter (among other papers) about his involvement with state party. You can read that interview [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d559ab9e3d&e=1acd9bb3d6). [\--> Click here for the full interview with Chairman Hupfer <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=479869d62a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| _**Happy Anniversary Indiana Democrats!**_ This week was the 10-year anniversary of when the Indiana House Democrats abandoned Hoosiers, walked out of their jobs, and took a month-long vacation in Illinois. Of course, over the last decade Hoosier voters have rewarded Democrats for their temper tantrum by electing Republicans! Today, Republicans hold every statewide office, super majorities in both houses of the General Assembly, 7 of 9 US House seats, both US Senate seats, 71 mayoral offices throughout Indiana and 88% of all elected county officials in the state. With numbers like that, it would seem the Democrats are still on vacation while our Republican Party is getting work done for all Hoosiers.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**The Republican Study Committee Host Mike Pence**_ This week, The Republican Study Committee, led by Rep. Jim Banks, hosted former Vice President Mike Pence to discuss our conservative agenda moving forward. It’s great to see two Hoosiers leading the way forward in Washington DC and the Republican Study Committee couldn’t get advice from a better leader than our own Mike Pence. As**** Rep. Banks said:
_** “Mike Pence is a statesman, he’s an optimist, and he’s a unifier. That’s what makes him unique in our moment and that’s why I think he’ll have a powerful moment in the future.” **_
Read more about the meeting [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a3c1980513&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[announces expansion of COVID19 vaccine eligibility](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e6a4e8f900&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[discusses agribusiness in Shelby County](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0e2b1cae76&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[honors Americans who have lost their lives to COVID19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7772502ffd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[hosts roundtable with business owners in Fort Wayne](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=76a9cd2dd8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[raises concerns about Democrat relief bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e53a011023&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[identifies left wing items hidden in the Dems relief bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eaa478f6c0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[honors the FFA during National FFA Week](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c75eadee3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[visits the Marion VA](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2883c8d8ba&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[speaks about the importance of telemedicine for Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eba9cce4cd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[warns that Democrats are hiding left wing items in relief bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c2eedf88c0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[thanks Hoosier law enforcement officers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bdef73cd60&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Now I serve as a Congressman in the MOST conservative district in the country, and I'm determined to continue the Trump Agenda every day I serve. But Democrats and the Never-Trump Swamp want to see me OUT of Washington. clean_body: I won't give up == Friend, Very few people in Washington will say these words: President Trump 's America First Agenda is the future of our Republican Party. I had the pleasure of serving in the Trump White House as his senior medical advisor. Now I serve as a Congressman in the MOST conservative district in the country, and I'm determined to continue the Trump Agenda every day I serve. But Democrats and the Never-Trump Swamp want to see me OUT of Washington. They are spending MILLIONS to defeat strong Trump Republicans like myself, and I'm determined to do everything in my power to STOP them. But I need your help. I have a CRITICAL fundraising deadline on Sunday, and I'm still behind my goal. == == == I'm not the type of Republican who will buckle under pressure when times get tough. I know that President Trump's America First Agenda is the future of our party. I won't EVER stop defending that agenda because I WON'T EVER STOP DEFENDING YOU! But for me to fight as hard as I can, I need your support. == Thank you, Ronny Jackson == | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson PO BOX 53058 AMARILLO, TX 79159 == | | Texans for Ronny Jackson | PO BOX 53058, Amarillo, TX 73159 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

| Patriots -
I'm excited to be back at CPAC this year in the great state of Florida and to have Donald Trump here with me. [At last year's CPAC I made a historic announcement:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxkBZ9OXyNw5t_zTYOVeTKg9wBO23XoSmYl3GaaC7YVgHm60sZeCcfO9Hu7TUlU51dFwuCRiBtbgBROSx3xWieFFbxG3A8zd2VjyJZ4jQUQY86DMbGSSDcro3Adck7L2nFXSwqFPIG3uG28fqwPIX4Ml61C3UHFHJqYJ0645dWnEB7RBhlmXLQ==&c=CITH_9cvUmoNl-sjqeQ2s4I0g_b1C1-gPyTmxoiPOuqSkcYWa1mjpA==&ch=DOva9ElLlwrw2hHZfmTBdaGoGDLEJS2kkerPIvb0CBLf_MpLdgLpjQ==)
I no longer take money from Political Action Committees \- the deepest swamp in Washington.
Still today, I am the only Republican to make this pledge. For too long, special interest PACs have had a stranglehold over our government and too many "conservatives" are nothing more than mouthpieces for these special interest groups. Polluters should not set environmental standards. Insurance companies shouldn't get special rules to cheat policyholders. Big Tech should not be allowed to define debate in our country as they buy off Congress - but they do.

Democrats are sneaking their pro-abortion agenda into their pandemic relief package.

Joe Biden preaches unity. But in reality, the Biden administration and the Democrats put their entire liberal wishlist into this bill and are trying to force it through.

**One of the most egregious pieces of this bill is the expansion of abortion funded by taxpayer dollars.** It's clear, Friend, that pandemic relief is important to this country. Peter,
_**Did you see this email from Josh?**_

Joe Biden is trying to demolish President Trump’s legacy of strong border enforcement. His Justice Department can’t be counted on to crack down on illegal border crossings. We **CANNOT** allow liberals to open our borders. We must continue to be a nation of law and order.

**We are currently $23,155 away from hitting our fundraising deadline.** With only 2 days left, **WE NEED YOUR HELP** to make sure we reach our goal before this month comes to an end.
[**February Deadline Approaching! - Donate _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2d7b710989143899d9c524d6acc7f79&_e=fQx-a4F-BYOId7FobEcgrQS5LabFLLYQAhA35yPICj2rVmYNanGklwF5mNytWVFH3ziczbjlwZfgMDsaPhkcaCNqLxHjNNZ98Rj_llyEbJ71Cyim4Y9Zcw4zIneHrzhKA3-1MQ70QdIZACfpnb7s-vzE6vlJgyQP973iu5pbjfiP0Or3EsMn1sD3-su0QnOopPEGlBa2MQjU529LqC57GLdbMDZbturFoTmuZegwK0cXFdDr5Lm1UOyBQt6VTJXa2_oskA9PzSmag5Ku-Ji5yjGzltUKG_rywmAYUsmM6VycvA9Ad57iG9Sy-V4EhGEPa4rVzd8g63GFotIlU02sXWL9RFTi-sUDF7h77RzUg-Lc_-xNc7KDgRqroMwEGjpE09oKzzhHSNEIj9DlNCDiXQ%3D%3D)
Josh continues to ask the hard questions in Washington for us. Last week he pushed Biden’s nominee for Attorney General Merrick Garland on immigration. Garland refused to answer whether or not he would enforce our immigration laws!

_**If the United States Attorney General isn’t going to enforce our nation's laws, who will?**_

[**_Demand Democrats Enforce Our Laws! >>>_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2d7b710989143899d9c524d6acc7f79&_e=fQx-a4F-BYOId7FobEcgrQS5LabFLLYQAhA35yPICj2rVmYNanGklwF5mNytWVFH3ziczbjlwZfgMDsaPhkcaCNqLxHjNNZ98Rj_llyEbJ71Cyim4Y9Zcw4zIneHrzhKA3-1MQ70QdIZACfpnb7s-vzE6vlJgyQP973iu5pbjfiP0Or3EsMn1sD3-su0QnOozMPMKnWAlQaLlM5aj91sGU0p3EV327Grm4bOWykeQBV-SJaaGioU0QCY7Vn6BsQOZ1S1ZkMBwpQLyOCHcvTS6Dca7m13Xs_Dw0kbQ7UIxNycSZPleP7PmJ_MRBWDseICGEF92ee6i4UiM16lerQj-jAHfZKhMcUMPxuR_31xuYR70fWw6dPgOSK-xPEMikFzVX01g-4kKSINDCuC2QCfZg%3D%3D)

\- Team Hawley

\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Josh Hawley
Date: February 25th, 2021
Subject: Biden's Immigration Problem
Dear Peter,
Normal people think law enforcement means enforcing the law. **Joe Biden’s White House thinks it means ignoring the law.**

Normal people think illegal immigrants should be caught at our border and illegal entry should be prosecuted. **The Biden Administration’s nominee for Attorney General told me this week he “hadn’t thought” about whether illegal immigration should even be a crime.** And he refused to commit to prosecuting illegal border crossings!

Imagine if you told your boss you hadn’t given any thought to the most basic duties of your job. _**You’d be fired!**_ For Joe Biden, ignorance on immigration is a job qualification.

That’s because the Biden Administration is reportedly proposing re-organizing Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE), in a move that would drastically cut down on deportations of illegal immigrants.

**The Biden Administration is considering amnesty for 11 million illegal immigrants, all while nearly 11 million Americans are out of work!**

He’s doing this out of spite for President Trump’s legacy of border enforcement. _**He couldn’t care less what it means for you. **_

Biden is not looking out for your job. He’s not promising to keep your community safe. He’s paying off the corporate special interests who demand cheap foreign labor and couldn’t care less about violent crime.

**My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of this month to show Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer that we have had enough - our country’s future is too important.** _We demand that our immigration laws be enforced._
[_**Help us reach our February goal >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2d7b710989143899d9c524d6acc7f79&_e=fQx-a4F-BYOId7FobEcgrQS5LabFLLYQAhA35yPICj2rVmYNanGklwF5mNytWVFH3ziczbjlwZfgMDsaPhkcaCNqLxHjNNZ98Rj_llyEbJ71Cyim4Y9Zcw4zIneHrzhKA3-1MQ70QdIZACfpnb7s-vzE6vlJgyQP973iu5pbjfiP0Or3EsMn1sD3-su0QnOor7Lyz8NEHkwBJ_fC98_EXjhw--1EAvF5YrFEUbGjoOY43zXqgO0JNORy4YbYN9EfW8X06HJ9_Ht6KXrbTp7YhCcnYl0ztWUv1fDgweIgCf38VYQFFvVmrVEJGwj8rz2eQVGxmnGrMlp3S4xtMPTDhinyE-384XObbQRfti0waGpX6uxW-yZBrVpCOLjvc-h2NRujsdpQv8R3W_Bca0X2-g%3D%3D)
It’s not right to open our borders for illegal immigrants while American citizens are locked down in their own country.

**If we don’t stand up now, our borders will be overrun by a surge of illegal entries._I need your help in this fight!_**
[_**Donate NOW!**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d2d7b710989143899d9c524d6acc7f79&_e=fQx-a4F-BYOId7FobEcgrQS5LabFLLYQAhA35yPICj2rVmYNanGklwF5mNytWVFH3ziczbjlwZfgMDsaPhkcaCNqLxHjNNZ98Rj_llyEbJ71Cyim4Y9Zcw4zIneHrzhKA3-1MQ70QdIZACfpnb7s-vzE6vlJgyQP973iu5pbjfiP0Or3EsMn1sD3-su0QnOoHda-NtL5lNb7hKK0D-qukFO2KDtxzJ5dXi68GkUhvgw4Oj07kR6H1a4Pfu3hNxlgRmPwDNrTYjTFHx7OF3X0i_j9pK1wkJPjU8KDVaETP8SRtvbQBchxdh7sqvmoos0I8SuKGM52iKcDY1vcj8PHAEHCNigPWqnQ07pHEgFe4lm25rSIRzzW75Cj1RqQCYFAwMZFVStGpARTCYxFnni8Jg%3D%3D)

Josh Hawley

clean_body: ** . == Friend, Michelle Steel needs your help. We are only a few days away from the end of the month, which means Michelle must hit her monthly fundraising goal if we have any chance at restoring common sense in Washington. If she doesn 't, the Democrats will have an upper hand, and taking back the House in 2022 will be even harder.== | == == Currently, the outlook is not good. Michelle is behind where she needs to be, and time is quickly running out. If we don't reach our goal by the upcoming deadline, Michelle will have even more ground to make up, giving Nancy Pelosi an advantage. == Right now, the stakes couldn't be higher. Last year, the Democrats spent $11 million to silence Michelle. It didn't work. But that won't stop them the next time around. The radical opponent Michelle defeated last time has already pledged for a rematch. Michelle needs your support so she can continue to fight against job-killing tax hikes and to keep advocating on behalf of California's small businesses. == == == ==** \-- California Republican Alerts With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

They don’t even realize their talk of ‘Democratic Socialism’ is identical to what Hugo Chavez used to push socialism in Venezuela! We can’t let this Socialist history repeat itself in America! clean_body: [WATCH] This is ridiculous! Did you see me call out Nancy Pelosi on Fox News recently?... | | Peter ー did you see me call out Nancy Pelosi on Fox News recently? | | Peter, this is ridiculous! Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have completely frozen Republicans out of negotiations for COVID-19 relief, including crucial funding for SMALL BUSINESSES! Apparently, it’s Nancy’s Way or the Highway... Helping American small businesses stay afloat and recover shouldn’t be a partisan or difficult choice. Throughout this pandemic, Nancy Pelosi slowed down legislation meant to help small businesses and instead chose to prioritize things on her radical wishlist. This is nothing more than political payback to small-town America because they handed Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats a surprising upset in the 2020 Election! Peter, that's why I started the 🚨 MAIN STREET DEFENSE FUND 🚨...because Nancy Pelosi will never care about the plight of American small businesses, and the only way we can defend them is by RETAKING THE MAJORITY in Congress! | | | 🚨 MAIN STREET DEFENSE FUND 🚨 | | ---|---|--- | Peter, these attacks and restrictions on American small businesses won’t stop until Democrats lose their majority in Congress. it's now or never | |

| |
In January, I was sworn into the U.S. Senate and immediately got to work for Kansans and the American people.

Now, our FIRST End of Month fundraising deadline is almost here.

_This is our first deadline since I’ve been in the U.S. Senate._

And it’s our first deadline since Joe Biden became president.

**Over the last month, we’ve seen what the Democrats are focused on.** They’re not interested in unity. They’re obsessed with transforming America — by wiping out blue collar jobs, keeping our economy locked down, and ending the Second Amendment as we know it.

_And they want to “cancel” anyone who gets in their way._

_You have my word — I will ALWAYS hold Joe Biden and the Democrats accountable for their extreme agenda and their obsession with silencing conservatives._

**But the truth is, I can’t do this alone. To truly hold the Left accountable — and to WIN back the Senate next year — I need conservatives like YOU standing with me this year. **

[**And that starts with our FIRST 2021 End of Month deadline. Will you please pitch in whatever you can right now?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=e184077f30&e=0b94e583bc)

name: Rita Hart Updates
subject: catching Peter up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa |
body:
Peter,

With so much happening in the news these days, we wanted to make sure you were caught up on the latest with our contested election here in Iowa’s 2nd district!

Our press team put together a few articles that we think everyone should see. Take a look:

KCCI: US House takes first step in reviewing Iowa's contested 2nd district results
"Politico reports the House Administration Committee met Friday to establish procedures that it will use to consider elections contested under the Federal Contested Elections Act."
https://www.kcci.com/article/us-house-takes-first-step-in-reviewing-iowas-contested-2nd-district-results/35571370

Quad-City Times: Miller-Meeks' attorney looking for rejected ballots in contested Iowa U.S. House race
"Had the 22 ballots been tallied, Hart, of Wheatland, argues she would have won by nine votes."
https://qctimes.com/news/local/updated-miller-meeks-attorney-looking-for-rejected-ballots-in-contested-iowa-u-s-house-race/article_59fa4fed-2f71-5503-abfb-95c8eefc7ec6.html

IPR News: Hart Attorney Remains 'Confident' In Election Contest Before The U.S. House
“'I am more confident now than I was when I last talked to you that Rita Hart is going to be sworn in as the next congresswoman from IA-02, that she obtained more lawful votes,' Elias said."
https://www.iowapublicradio.org/ipr-news/2021-01-25/hart-attorney-remains-confident-in-election-contest-before-the-u-s-house

Throughout this whole process, we’ve been clear about what should happen here in IA-02: We should count the votes.

Twenty-two voters are still waiting for their legally-cast ballots to be included in the tally for this race, and they’re speaking out. Watch this video here as they tell their powerful stories >>

https://twitter.com/RitaHartIA/status/1362090015363325953?s=20

We’re expecting to know more in the next few weeks, so stay tuned! In the meantime, thank you for sticking with us. This has been a much longer journey than we thought we’d have, but it’s worth a few extra months to make sure all the votes are counted and get Rita to Congress!

-All of us at Rita Hart for Iowa

clean_body: Peter, With so much happening in the news these days, we wanted to make sure you were caught up on the latest with our contested election here in Iowa’s 2nd district! Our press team put together a few articles that we think everyone should see. Take a look: KCCI: US House takes first step in reviewing Iowa's contested 2nd district results "Politico reports the House Administration Committee met Friday to establish procedures that it will use to consider elections contested under the Federal Contested Elections Act." Quad-City Times: Miller-Meeks' attorney looking for rejected ballots in contested Iowa U.S. House race "Had the 22 ballots been tallied, Hart, of Wheatland, argues she would have won by nine votes." IPR News: Hart Attorney Remains 'Confident' In Election Contest Before The U.S. House “'I am more confident now than I was when I last talked to you that Rita Hart is going to be sworn in as the next congresswoman from IA-02, that she obtained more lawful votes,' Elias said." Throughout this whole process, we’ve been clear about what should happen here in IA-02: We should count the votes. Twenty-two voters are still waiting for their legally-cast ballots to be included in the tally for this race, and they’re speaking out. body:

| | Derek,

It's our friend Senator Kaine's birthday today! We're reaching out, because we'd like to get as many of Mark's supporters as possible to send Tim birthday messages.

**[Will you sign a birthday card for Tim Kaine?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8cc/53d9897e/5525c1c5/1c88df83/615903476/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-tkbday")** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8cc/53d9897e/5525c1c5/1c88df83/615903476/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-tkbday")

name: Tim Scott
subject: The liberal media is trying to erase me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
The liberal media can't stand my story. They hate the fact that as a Black man who grew up with a single mom, I am a principled Republican who fights for conservative values.
Friend,

**The liberal media can 't stand my story.** They hate the fact that as a Black man who grew up with a single mom, I am a principled Republican who fights for conservative values.

**They like to conveniently forget I exist, even during Black History Month.**

[](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stand-against-liberal-lies/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210226_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1049108-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210226_the-liberal-media-is-trying-to-erase-me/)

name: Moms in Office
subject: It's been a difficult month. We need your help, Peter
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email [secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email]February has been
a long month
Hi Peter,
While February is only 28 days long, this year it has seemed much longer. We started out the month watching members of Congress recount the traumatic events of January 6th during the second impeachment trial of the former occupant of the White House.
As many of you know, I live in Houston. Last week, I spent three days without heat while temperatures outside dropped below freezing. Two of our board members also dealt with the power and water outages here in Texas. Meanwhile, Ted Cruz jetted off to Cancun and the energy companies hiked prices. Please help Moms in Office support Texans in need after the winter storms. [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0226]
Moms for Texas [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0226]We know that after nearly a year of dealing with a pandemic, which has hit moms particularly hard, times are tough for many of us. After a week in which my family's focus turned to the basic necessities of shelter, food, and water, and with many Texans still recovering, all of us at Moms in Office have a renewed commitment to ensuring that we elect leaders who will not abandon families in their times of need.
Thanks for all you do,
Elisa
Donate [secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4texas?refcode=0226]https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Need you to stop Pelosi & put Conservatives back in control of the House

body:
We need every single conservative who reads this message to step up TODAY.

********
Hello Patriot,

Your support for our America First movement has been incredible, but our fight is far from over.

Our next major fundraising deadline is **just 2 days away**...and House Conservatives are nowhere near where they need to be to reach their CRITICAL goal for the month.

What's worse? _**Right now, Nancy Pelosi is actively trying to oust rightfully elected Republicans with the goal of replacing them with her hand-picked Democrat allies.**_

Now more than ever, we need you to stand with House conservatives. [**Can you chip in a 500% matched gift to make sure we reach our goal?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrDlNNdeboxargo-vOPpXjV3nEgy32iLVsERQmn2GLKI7wHyaAMJPCn-oAkEzLHuDsQHGxWiSP_oD8lc4e7Ta-cpkFxuaovbVCgzx5XLf4IFp6CiHWjTl-pqyZiYlKCrlH1UfmyLvAJ9gxG_DYarOeS1JbbLdCnvcSThcyonQCENbmXcTlyVR-dmRD-mHGurldzLpX3SXRj7ySvyR9Z4rIlnJ-Z6mC0pRaCxnYBSKHtiQAGlQUVf3N_Xwz_v9MTlj3LvOHvZEbQseu93995N6kA4oINY16Cy08jOiJCucZOuOvzRWGx0VqXcj3z0b19d3jhbRsx-ybgv3bfKSwrQ34wNZlsAMRUpjizTeL3QazzIpPd8xNtzFn6haqSFwGHkxzA3f3hLsa8HVU-ELHfmPXgNkb6WmoRlzNyl0TM_oi6rjaTbciI6i0sFSazXV_ObXOyJcECIZwvrk65IvWhnTW2FvYT3CIK-3g6wy_xQmZH4oi3KXiFc6-OfDvyt8sv9&c=KAyeM-7EdWtACFLrNy9bfgLOxqiZN589Afws0LxLQb5R9wYJuiMApg==&ch=Q8APjZpgy3it-uWD3ODxqmGBBfr6J0ZT4eXxh3VjwcOyuS-MedVILg==)

**Democrats are holding on to a razor-thin majority -- just 5 seats need to be flipped from BLUE to RED to defeat Pelosi and take back the House for conservatives.** If you are a dedicated supporter of House Conservatives, I have a mission for you -- [**make a 5x matched gift before midnight to take back the House!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrDlNNdeboxargo-vOPpXjV3nEgy32iLVsERQmn2GLKI7wHyaAMJPCn-oAkEzLHuDsQHGxWiSP_oD8lc4e7Ta-cpkFxuaovbVCgzx5XLf4IFp6CiHWjTl-pqyZiYlKCrlH1UfmyLvAJ9gxG_DYarOeS1JbbLdCnvcSThcyonQCENbmXcTlyVR-dmRD-mHGurldzLpX3SXRj7ySvyR9Z4rIlnJ-Z6mC0pRaCxnYBSKHtiQAGlQUVf3N_Xwz_v9MTlj3LvOHvZEbQseu93995N6kA4oINY16Cy08jOiJCucZOuOvzRWGx0VqXcj3z0b19d3jhbRsx-ybgv3bfKSwrQ34wNZlsAMRUpjizTeL3QazzIpPd8xNtzFn6haqSFwGHkxzA3f3hLsa8HVU-ELHfmPXgNkb6WmoRlzNyl0TM_oi6rjaTbciI6i0sFSazXV_ObXOyJcECIZwvrk65IvWhnTW2FvYT3CIK-3g6wy_xQmZH4oi3KXiFc6-OfDvyt8sv9&c=KAyeM-7EdWtACFLrNy9bfgLOxqiZN589Afws0LxLQb5R9wYJuiMApg==&ch=Q8APjZpgy3it-uWD3ODxqmGBBfr6J0ZT4eXxh3VjwcOyuS-MedVILg==)

**
500% matching is active until midnight.**

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrDlNNdeboxargo-vOPpXjV3nEgy32iLVsERQmn2GLKI7wHyaAMJPCn-oAkEzLHuDsQHGxWiSP_oD8lc4e7Ta-cpkFxuaovbVCgzx5XLf4IFp6CiHWjTl-pqyZiYlKCrlH1UfmyLvAJ9gxG_DYarOeS1JbbLdCnvcSThcyonQCENbmXcTlyVR-dmRD-mHGurldzLpX3SXRj7ySvyR9Z4rIlnJ-Z6mC0pRaCxnYBSKHtiQAGlQUVf3N_Xwz_v9MTlj3LvOHvZEbQseu93995N6kA4oINY16Cy08jOiJCucZOuOvzRWGx0VqXcj3z0b19d3jhbRsx-ybgv3bfKSwrQ34wNZlsAMRUpjizTeL3QazzIpPd8xNtzFn6haqSFwGHkxzA3f3hLsa8HVU-ELHfmPXgNkb6WmoRlzNyl0TM_oi6rjaTbciI6i0sFSazXV_ObXOyJcECIZwvrk65IvWhnTW2FvYT3CIK-3g6wy_xQmZH4oi3KXiFc6-OfDvyt8sv9&c=KAyeM-7EdWtACFLrNy9bfgLOxqiZN589Afws0LxLQb5R9wYJuiMApg==&ch=Q8APjZpgy3it-uWD3ODxqmGBBfr6J0ZT4eXxh3VjwcOyuS-MedVILg==)

[**TAKE A STAND**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrDlNNdeboxargo-vOPpXjV3nEgy32iLVsERQmn2GLKI7wHyaAMJPCn-oAkEzLHuDsQHGxWiSP_oD8lc4e7Ta-cpkFxuaovbVCgzx5XLf4IFp6CiHWjTl-pqyZiYlKCrlH1UfmyLvAJ9gxG_DYarOeS1JbbLdCnvcSThcyonQCENbmXcTlyVR-dmRD-mHGurldzLpX3SXRj7ySvyR9Z4rIlnJ-Z6mC0pRaCxnYBSKHtiQAGlQUVf3N_Xwz_v9MTlj3LvOHvZEbQseu93995N6kA4oINY16Cy08jOiJCucZOuOvzRWGx0VqXcj3z0b19d3jhbRsx-ybgv3bfKSwrQ34wNZlsAMRUpjizTeL3QazzIpPd8xNtzFn6haqSFwGHkxzA3f3hLsa8HVU-ELHfmPXgNkb6WmoRlzNyl0TM_oi6rjaTbciI6i0sFSazXV_ObXOyJcECIZwvrk65IvWhnTW2FvYT3CIK-3g6wy_xQmZH4oi3KXiFc6-OfDvyt8sv9&c=KAyeM-7EdWtACFLrNy9bfgLOxqiZN589Afws0LxLQb5R9wYJuiMApg==&ch=Q8APjZpgy3it-uWD3ODxqmGBBfr6J0ZT4eXxh3VjwcOyuS-MedVILg==)

Democrats are willing to do ANYTHING and EVERYTHING to remain in power. They've already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars on attack ads and smear campaigns to slander Republicans in target districts, just weeks after their party took complete control of Washington.

_**We can 't let them succeed.**_

Winning back the House will be a difficult task. We need every single conservative who reads this message to step up TODAY.

Will you help us stop Pelosi and put Conservatives back in control of the House? [**Please chip in while 500% matching is available!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrDlNNdeboxargo-vOPpXjV3nEgy32iLVsERQmn2GLKI7wHyaAMJPCn-oAkEzLHuDsQHGxWiSP_oD8lc4e7Ta-cpkFxuaovbVCgzx5XLf4IFp6CiHWjTl-pqyZiYlKCrlH1UfmyLvAJ9gxG_DYarOeS1JbbLdCnvcSThcyonQCENbmXcTlyVR-dmRD-mHGurldzLpX3SXRj7ySvyR9Z4rIlnJ-Z6mC0pRaCxnYBSKHtiQAGlQUVf3N_Xwz_v9MTlj3LvOHvZEbQseu93995N6kA4oINY16Cy08jOiJCucZOuOvzRWGx0VqXcj3z0b19d3jhbRsx-ybgv3bfKSwrQ34wNZlsAMRUpjizTeL3QazzIpPd8xNtzFn6haqSFwGHkxzA3f3hLsa8HVU-ELHfmPXgNkb6WmoRlzNyl0TM_oi6rjaTbciI6i0sFSazXV_ObXOyJcECIZwvrk65IvWhnTW2FvYT3CIK-3g6wy_xQmZH4oi3KXiFc6-OfDvyt8sv9&c=KAyeM-7EdWtACFLrNy9bfgLOxqiZN589Afws0LxLQb5R9wYJuiMApg==&ch=Q8APjZpgy3it-uWD3ODxqmGBBfr6J0ZT4eXxh3VjwcOyuS-MedVILg==)

Thanks,

Dan Crenshaw

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010zJu84xEuEhERHXv7rHUOaEFJmMlPSyHNxeKqOlaPAlldPZ6dgG5SMciGEtCsx5AAd6YdMKms-shaRycOS6rOItl4J9JntBSrjy4Mt6G1yG_6uIRK-jZPETWU2eHSxiZ2npXWLmaqO0=&c=_oBJw6MzWqVfyClvTQc7MQuPbPYvkwERKZ_6ZTAPHf-yT5Y_HraG3Q==&ch=pQQHubqNKlBgMTUqz-on_jg3TryxzVR1T7Y8Rz4JBjhefROlDhnozQ==).

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Watch Stacey Abrams' congressional testimony on the importance of protecting the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/7026400/1257320083/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Dear Friend - Yesterday, as state legislative bodies around the country were advancing an unprecedented number of voter suppression bills, Fair Fight Action founder Stacey Abrams testified in Congress on the importance of federal action to protect our democracy and ensure access to the ballot box regardless of zip code. Arguing for H.R. 1, she said, "Democracy works best when we install guardrails to ensure every American has an equal opportunity to make their voice heard and be fairly represented." **Click[here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/7026401/1257320083/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fI77J1RlVm4&feature=emb_logo") to view her remarks. **The hearing starts at 13:44 and Stacey Abrams' testimony begins at 39:08. As we fight voter suppression in the states, we must urge immediate federal action on the right to vote in order to stop voter suppression laws state Republican leaders are advancing due to their false claims of voter fraud. **Please urge your U.S. Representative to support H.R. 1- For the People Act- by calling the U.S. Capitol Switchboard at 202-224-3121 and asking to be connected to your Member of Congress.** You can find your Representative [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/702640e/1257320083/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative#:~:text=If%20you%20know%20who%20your,the%20U.S.%20House%20switchboard%20operator"). Thank you for making your voice heard to strengthen our democracy. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo and the whole team at Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/702640f/1257320083/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/702640c/1257320083/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa37b/34a064cc/1dbf2682/702640d/1257320083/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Team Stitt Alerts
subject: Will you help keep OK leading?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STITT FOR GOVERNOR 2022
body:
This just in: Oklahoma has $1.2 billion in surplus to our state budget.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lxmcxFm_c8phg9gikZbJ0dUDXkoiyrTC-BIXO0ZW0Z8PovJBFqo6fHu8_1aGYQi9qc86iE353cx1UeQlV5ku0c2h17QqCkHCAq3FryUrQ0BFTGppKCmN9NTmojT51pkkpjGv7DCx2385hSKZbLFixJUB-MNBrViJN2bIHGev5ifEkUkPPqfyfHAcj5g2dbwhGJYdygAyxBf1dJt_xUQYErzjp1F-MdSugfmtQCSQBA8HYd_96nGJ0s4hSJEmRO9WJXld4cXKQT5vP6WdraUPjhon8eEbIe7nQ6dx2joL4SZ42iNurxeEI4NAoOOvxg3EWSU6nWQoq7acFoTnNMNmTf0ymGMAuWqYKF0fslOXWHczERDXBLSLGL8cVHEEpr1147yAnTXeK3ufVfLc81YjJw==&c=XeeyoD8wRZ6OclutswZjbqAe2CJDc3mUVpMA4-6IcRfezmfcVzi-DQ==&ch=ck0iSyvO9JJshGQRwOVhXo65k2xuZBjrW9Jvk5tFWlW9xgryA7d94g==)
**_$1.2 billion surplus._** You read that right, Friend. Thanks to Governor Kevin Stitt's leadership, Oklahoma has $1.2 billion in surplus to our state budget. clean_body: This is really important &zwnj == == Friend, The Biden Administration and the radical left want to follow a time-consuming plan that will undo all the progress conservatives have made the last four years. They want to bankrupt our livestock industry by imposing synthetic beef mandates, keep our children out of classrooms, and use our taxpayer dollars to bail out states like California and New York. I am trying to put a stop to these nonsense policies, but I need your help! your support, we don 't stand a chance of fighting back against these policies and winning. **== == == == I am fighting to bring some Iowa Common Sense back to Washington to stick up for you and families like yours across the country. But it's not easy with the Democrats controlling The White House and Congress. we just got the latest FEC reports to our office and they're NOT good.

body:
As a leading conservative, I want to keep you updated on critical issues we are involved in. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f76dc9a8cb3f/ag-morrisey-survey-request-impeachment-670945?e=24057c0240)
---
|
---
|
---
# CONSERVATIVE NEWS UPDATE
**Introduction** As a leading conservative, I want to keep you updated on critical issues we are involved in. Please let us know your thoughts so that we hear your voice.
|
---
**Morrisey Fights Congressional Censorship** This week, [my Office sent a letter to twelve cable and satellite companies](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=3cc6f77528&e=24057c0240) urging them to reject Congressional attempts to stifle free-speech and deplatform conservative news outlets. Our efforts caught the attention of OANN and the Wall Street Journal. Journal columnist Kim Strassel noted that AG Patrick Morrisey and Governor Ron DeSantis were out-in-front leading against blatant censorship efforts.
* OANN Interview -> [Watch our YouTube Video](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=388be4057d&e=24057c0240)

* Wall Street Journal Article -> [Read Here](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=d8153085e7&e=24057c0240)

|
---
**Second Amendment Rights** 🔫[Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is participating in a legal brief with many of his GOP colleagues to support your gun-rights](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=88f40c7338&e=24057c0240), which are at risk due to the New York Attorney General’s action against the NRA. Morrisey is one of the leading voices in the country defending the 2nd Amendment.
|
---
**Protecting Precious Life** 👶Attorney General Patrick Morrisey recently expressed strong opposition to the Biden Administration’s announcement that it would be [readministrating the “Mexico-City” pro-abortion policy](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=1014efc888&e=24057c0240). Attorney General Morrisey is a champion for innocent life and has played a critical role in advancing pro-life legislation and defending pro-life policies in court.
|
---
**Say No to the Green New Deal** 🔋In light of the importance of energy and manufacturing jobs in West Virginia, [AG Patrick Morrisey has taken a leading role in opposition to the Biden Administration’s efforts to impose Green New Deal policies on our country.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=080a67212f&e=24057c0240)Morrisey recently signed onto a Montana-led letter, asking the Biden Administration to reverse its Keystone Pipeline decision, and is building a legal coalition to thwart Biden’s goal of advancing an even-more aggressive version of Obama’s so-called “Clean Power Plan” on the American people.
|
---
**Consumer Protection Week** 🏪Next week, West Virginians and Americans will learn a lot more about how to protect themselves from fraud and scams. [It’s consumer protection week — be on the lookout for helpful tips and suggestions](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=9bbecdf842&e=24057c0240) on how you can protect your identity and wallet and learn how not to get fleeced by the con-artists.
|
---
**Medicaid Fraud** 🏥[Attorney General Patrick Morrisey just announced this week that he had resolved allegations of Medicaid fraud and improper billing against a West Virginia hospital.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=0d4c1d3ea4&e=24057c0240) As a result of the collaborative effort between the feds and Morrisey’s Office, State and Federal authorities obtained $320,000 from the hospital.
|
---
Patrick MorriseyWest Virginia Attorney General
|
---
| [Sign up for Updates](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=d762e6dc40&e=24057c0240)
---
| [Donate $25 to Defend America](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=ea59c607fa&e=24057c0240)

On to assembling your team!

NDTC-TLDR-Logo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMGZpZmJxNTc1b3Rra293YWR4cHgiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vQVd2SmhQQm9JVC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

Peter — You’ve created a winning campaign plan. You’re
ready to adapt your plan as things change.

Soooooo... What’s next?

Assembling your team, that’s what!

It’s a lot of work running a campaign, you can’t do it on your
own. You need people to make those plans a reality.

That is why in the month of March we will focus on assembling
your team — the people who will be in the campaign trenches with
you getting things done!

( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMGZpZmJxNTc1b3Rra293YWR4cHgiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vSm1iR3JEWmlPMi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

Below, you’ll find just some of our resources to help
you assemble, train, and advance your team all the way to
election day.

Good luck!

— The NDTC Team

------------------------
Train-the-Trainer Summit
------------------------

Are you ready to grow your team of volunteers or local leaders?
Are you ready to learn best practices for training them to hit
their goals, AND return for another shift?

Well, clear your calendars, because you won’t want to miss our
virtual, full-day Train-the-Trainer Summit on Saturday, March
13th!

Whether you attend the full day or just a few sessions, this
training will walk you through how you can facilitate a training
that keeps your volunteers coming back for more.

Click here to RSVP and learn more!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMGZpZmJxNTc1b3Rra293YWR4cHgiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vNWRpeWlPYVg2ai9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10bGRyXHUwMDI2X19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0 )

Building Your Volunteer Team
